creator: matthieu@labs.fr
text:
Hello,

it fails before compiling :

# make
Dependency error: this port wants the ncurses library from the FreeBSD
base system. You can't build against it, while a newer
version is installed by a port.
Please deinstall the port or undefine WITH_NCURSES_BASE.
*** Error code 1

Regards,

Matthieu

On Mon, Feb 27, 2012 at 12:39 PM, Jase Thew <freebsd@beardz.net> wrote:

> Hi,
>
> Can you please elaborate on what you mean by broken? Does it fail to
> compile, or does it fail to run correctly? Exactly what behaviour are you
> seeing?
>
> Regards,
>
> Jase Thew.
>
